title: The Tavern
description: The Tavern - modpack created by a small group of friends to play together :)
body:
![Alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/miki20081/TheTavern/main/The%20TAvern%20explemation.png 'The Tavern')

The Tavern is a modpack created by a small group of friends to play together :)

## Some Futures
- More Structures
- Better Villages
- More variety of ores
- Harder Ender Dragon Fight
- More Armors to play with
- Better transportation methods
- More Beautiful blocks with [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled 'Rechiseled') and more
- And even more to offer
---
### How to install 📥 :

From Website:
- Go to versions
- Select a version
- download and import in [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app 'Modrith link') or any other launcher. More info on how to install [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/ 'tutorial link').

Inside Modrinth app:
- install [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app 'Modrith link')
- Go to Browse
- Search "The Tavern"
- go to versions and install version you want
---
